channel.title: Sophos Limited — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Sophos Limited (sophos).

item.title: CVE-2025-10159 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: An authentication bypass vulnerability allows remote attackers to gain administrative privileges on Sophos AP6 Series Wireless Access Points older than firmware version 1.7.2563 (MR7).

item.title: CVE-2024-13973 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: A post-auth SQL injection vulnerability in WebAdmin of Sophos Firewall versions older than 21.0 MR1 (21.0.1) can potentially lead to administrators achieving arbitrary code execution.

item.title: CVE-2024-13974 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: A business logic vulnerability in the Up2Date component of Sophos Firewall older than version 21.0 MR1 (20.0.1) can lead to attackers controlling the firewall’s DNS environment to achieve remote code execution.

item.title: CVE-2025-7382 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: A command injection vulnerability in WebAdmin of Sophos Firewall versions older than 21.0 MR2 (21.0.2) can lead to adjacent attackers achieving pre-auth code execution on High Availability (HA) auxiliary devices, if OTP authentication for the admin u…

item.title: CVE-2025-7624 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: An SQL injection vulnerability in the legacy (transparent) SMTP proxy of Sophos Firewall versions older than 21.0 MR2 (21.0.2) can lead to remote code execution, if a quarantining policy is active for Email and SFOS was upgraded from a version older…

item.title: CVE-2025-6704 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: An arbitrary file writing vulnerability in the Secure PDF eXchange (SPX) feature of Sophos Firewall versions older than 21.0 MR2 (21.0.2) can lead to pre-auth remote code execution, if a specific configuration of SPX is enabled in combination with th…

item.title: CVE-2025-7433 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: A local privilege escalation vulnerability in Sophos Intercept X for Windows with Central Device Encryption 2025.1 and older allows arbitrary code execution.

item.title: CVE-2024-13972 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: A vulnerability related to registry permissions in the Intercept X for Windows updater prior to Core Agent version 2024.3.2 can lead to a local user gaining SYSTEM level privileges during a product upgrade.

item.title: CVE-2025-7472 · 7.5 HIGH
item.description: A local privilege escalation vulnerability in the Intercept X for Windows installer prior version 1.22 can lead to a local user gaining system level privileges, if the installer is run as SYSTEM.

item.title: CVE-2024-13861 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: A code injection vulnerability in the Debian package component of Taegis Endpoint Agent (Linux) versions older than 1.3.10 allows local users arbitrary code execution as root. Redhat-based systems using RPM packages are not affected.

item.title: CVE-2024-12729 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: A post-auth code injection vulnerability in the User Portal allows authenticated users to execute code remotely in Sophos Firewall older than version 21.0 MR1 (21.0.1).

item.title: CVE-2024-12728 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: A weak credentials vulnerability potentially allows privileged system access via SSH to Sophos Firewall older than version 20.0 MR3 (20.0.3).

item.title: CVE-2024-12727 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: A pre-auth SQL injection vulnerability in the email protection feature of Sophos Firewall versions older than 21.0 MR1 (21.0.1) allows access to the reporting database and can lead to remote code execution if a specific configuration of Secure PDF eX…

item.title: CVE-2024-8885 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: A local privilege escalation vulnerability in Sophos Intercept X for Windows with Central Device Encryption 2024.2.0 and older allows writing of arbitrary files.

item.title: CVE-2021-36806 · 4.7 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A reflected XSS vulnerability allows an open redirect when the victim clicks a malicious link to an error page on Sophos Email Appliance older than version 4.5.3.4.

item.title: CVE-2023-5552 · 7.1 HIGH
item.description: A password disclosure vulnerability in the Secure PDF eXchange (SPX) feature allows attackers with full email access to decrypt PDFs in Sophos Firewall version 19.5 MR3 (19.5.3) and older, if the password type is set to “Specified by sender”.

item.title: CVE-2023-1671 · 9.8 CRITICAL 💥 🌩️
item.description: A pre-auth command injection vulnerability in the warn-proceed handler of Sophos Web Appliance older than version 4.3.10.4 allows execution of arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2022-4934 · 7.2 HIGH
item.description: A post-auth command injection vulnerability in the exception wizard of Sophos Web Appliance older than version 4.3.10.4 allows administrators to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2020-36692 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A reflected XSS via POST vulnerability in report scheduler of Sophos Web Appliance versions older than 4.3.10.4 allows execution of JavaScript code in the victim browser via a malicious form that must be manually submitted by the victim while logged…

item.title: CVE-2022-4901 · 3.3 LOW
item.description: Multiple stored XSS vulnerabilities in Sophos Connect versions older than 2.2.90 allow Javascript code to run in the local UI via a malicious VPN configuration that must be manually loaded by the victim.

item.title: CVE-2022-48310 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: An information disclosure vulnerability allows sensitive key material to be included in technical support archives in Sophos Connect versions older than 2.2.90.

item.title: CVE-2022-48309 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A CSRF vulnerability allows malicious websites to retrieve logs and technical support archives in Sophos Connect versions older than 2.2.90.

item.title: CVE-2022-3713 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: A code injection vulnerability allows adjacent attackers to execute code in the Wifi controller of Sophos Firewall releases older than version 19.5 GA.

item.title: CVE-2022-3711 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: A post-auth read-only SQL injection vulnerability allows users to read non-sensitive configuration database contents in the User Portal of Sophos Firewall releases older than version 19.5 GA.

item.title: CVE-2022-3710 · 2.7 LOW
item.description: A post-auth read-only SQL injection vulnerability allows API clients to read non-sensitive configuration database contents in the API controller of Sophos Firewall releases older than version 19.5 GA.

item.title: CVE-2022-3709 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: A stored XSS vulnerability allows admin to super-admin privilege escalation in the Webadmin import group wizard of Sophos Firewall releases older than version 19.5 GA.

item.title: CVE-2022-3696 · 7.2 HIGH
item.description: A post-auth code injection vulnerability allows admins to execute code in Webadmin of Sophos Firewall releases older than version 19.5 GA.

item.title: CVE-2022-3226 · 7.2 HIGH
item.description: An OS command injection vulnerability allows admins to execute code via SSL VPN configuration uploads in Sophos Firewall releases older than version 19.5 GA.

item.title: CVE-2022-3980 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: An XML External Entity (XEE) vulnerability allows server-side request forgery (SSRF) and potential code execution in Sophos Mobile managed on-premises between versions 5.0.0 and 9.7.4.

item.title: CVE-2022-3236 · 9.8 CRITICAL 💥 🌩️
item.description: A code injection vulnerability in the User Portal and Webadmin allows a remote attacker to execute code in Sophos Firewall version v19.0 MR1 and older.

item.title: CVE-2022-1807 · 7.2 HIGH
item.description: Multiple SQLi vulnerabilities in Webadmin allow for privilege escalation from admin to super-admin in Sophos Firewall older than version 18.5 MR4 and version 19.0 MR1.

item.title: CVE-2021-25268 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: Multiple XSS vulnerabilities in Webadmin allow for privilege escalation from MySophos admin to SFOS admin in Sophos Firewall older than version 19.0 GA.

item.title: CVE-2021-25267 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Multiple XSS vulnerabilities in Webadmin allow for privilege escalation from admin to super-admin in Sophos Firewall older than version 19.0 GA.

item.title: CVE-2021-25266 · 3.9 LOW
item.description: An insecure data storage vulnerability allows a physical attacker with root privileges to retrieve TOTP secret keys from unlocked phones in Sophos Authenticator for Android version 3.4 and older, and Intercept X for Mobile (Android) before version 9.…

item.title: CVE-2022-0331 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: An information disclosure vulnerability in Webadmin allows an unauthenticated remote attacker to read the device serial number in Sophos Firewall version v18.5 MR2 and older.

item.title: CVE-2022-1040 · 9.8 CRITICAL 💥 🌩️
item.description: An authentication bypass vulnerability in the User Portal and Webadmin allows a remote attacker to execute code in Sophos Firewall version v18.5 MR3 and older.

item.title: CVE-2022-0652 · 3.3 LOW
item.description: Confd log files contain local users', including root’s, SHA512crypt password hashes with insecure access permissions. This allows a local attacker to attempt off-line brute-force attacks against these password hashes in Sophos UTM before version 9.71…

item.title: CVE-2022-0386 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: A post-auth SQL injection vulnerability in the Mail Manager potentially allows an authenticated attacker to execute code in Sophos UTM before version 9.710.

item.title: CVE-2021-36809 · 6.1 MEDIUM
item.description: A local attacker can overwrite arbitrary files on the system with VPN client logs using administrator privileges, potentially resulting in a denial of service and data loss, in all versions of Sophos SSL VPN client.

item.title: CVE-2022-0366 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: An authenticated and authorized agent user could potentially gain administrative access via an SQLi vulnerability to Capsule8 Console between versions 4.6.0 and 4.9.1.

item.title: CVE-2021-36807 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: An authenticated user could potentially execute code via an SQLi vulnerability in the user portal of SG UTM before version 9.708 MR8.

item.title: CVE-2021-25269 · 4.4 MEDIUM
item.description: A local administrator could prevent the HMPA service from starting despite tamper protection using an unquoted service path vulnerability in the HMPA component of Sophos Intercept X Advanced and Sophos Intercept X Advanced for Server before version 2…

item.title: CVE-2021-36808 · 5.9 MEDIUM
item.description: A local attacker could bypass the app password using a race condition in Sophos Secure Workspace for Android before version 9.7.3115.

item.title: CVE-2021-25271
item.description: A local attacker could read or write arbitrary files with administrator privileges in HitmanPro before version Build 318.

item.title: CVE-2021-25270
item.description: A local attacker could execute arbitrary code with administrator privileges in HitmanPro.Alert before version Build 901.

item.title: CVE-2021-25273
item.description: Stored XSS can execute as administrator in quarantined email detail view in Sophos UTM before version 9.706.

item.title: CVE-2021-25264
item.description: In multiple versions of Sophos Endpoint products for MacOS, a local attacker could execute arbitrary code with administrator privileges.

item.title: CVE-2021-25265
item.description: A malicious website could execute code remotely in Sophos Connect Client before version 2.1.
